svg.title: Stage 7 — OMS to Risk Manager pipeline diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing order events flowing from OMS through an SPSC queue to the risk thread, with a drop-and-log path when the queue is full, and risk state maintained separately from the critical path.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the OMS in an HFT pipeline')
sendPrompt('What is the role of the exchange in HFT?')
sendPrompt('Explain the SPSC queue in HFT risk shadowing')
sendPrompt('Why does the HFT risk shadow channel log dropped events?')
sendPrompt('What state does the risk thread maintain in HFT?')
sendPrompt('What are Greeks, exposure, and concentration limits in HFT risk?')
